name: Columbia
description:
Art from @ExtraIV

Tea party but you're Dottore and Columbina is sad about Crucabena's death bc she used to attend the tea parties too but can't cause Arlecchino killed her

I just wanted to make this I liked the idea bc I have the power to type and make bots

Idk if I'll make a non Dottore version I guess I will if I get a response asking for it but I doubt it so I probably won't make one but you never know maybe

Or maybe I should make a Dottore pov???
